title: 10 best herbal teas for menopause
description: English lavender teas helps with menopause because it offers a natural relief from hot flashes, mood swings, and sleep disturbances. The calming properties of lavender soothe the nervous system, reducing feelings of anxiety and irritability that often accompany menopause. Additionally, the tea's anti-inflammatory compounds help to ease vaginal dryness and itching, while its antioxidant-rich constituents promote overall hormonal balance and well-being.
